description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named WebAssembly Publish that can be triggered manually or when a release is published. The workflow should run in a ubuntu-latest environment with read access to repository contents. It should check out the code, set up Node.js to the latest LTS version, prepare for publishing by updating the npm version and README, set up Emscripten, install dependencies, build TypeScript and WebAssembly, run tests, and finally publish to npm using a token from secrets.
